004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.

006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.hocon;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
020
021import java.io.*;
022
023import org.apache.juneau.commons.lang.*;
024import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
025import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
026
027/**
028 * Specialized writer for serializing HOCON format.
029 *
030 * <p>
031 * Extends {@link SerializerWriter} with HOCON-specific methods for unquoted strings,
032 * triple-quoted strings ("""), equals sign separator, and formatting options.
033 *
034 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
035 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://github.com/lightbend/config/blob/main/HOCON.md">HOCON Specification</a>
036 * </ul>
037 */
038@SuppressWarnings({
039   "java:S135",  // Multiple break/continue necessary for isNumber char validation loop
040   "resource"    // Writer resource managed by calling code
041})
042public class HoconWriter extends SerializerWriter {
043
044   private static final AsciiSet QUOTE_KEY_CHARS = AsciiSet.of(" \t\n\r{},:[]=\"'#/");
045   // HOCON parser-meaningful chars that must be quoted in a value to avoid mis-tokenization:
046   //   `=` — alternate key-value assignment operator (also BASE64 padding).
047   //   `+` — first half of PLUS_EQUALS, and forbidden in unquoted strings (also Calendar
048   //         BASIC_ISO_DATE timezone offset, e.g. `20240615+0900`).
049   //   `$` — first half of `${...}` substitution, and forbidden in unquoted strings (also
050   //         ClassFormat.BINARY_NAME inner-class delimiter, e.g. `java.util.Map$Entry`).
051   //   `^ \ ? ! @ * &` — forbidden in unquoted strings by the HOCON tokenizer/spec, so values
052   //         containing them must be quoted for serializer->parser round-trip fidelity.
053   private static final AsciiSet QUOTE_VALUE_CHARS = AsciiSet.of(" \t\n\r{}[],:=+$\"'#^\\?!@*&");
054   private static final AsciiSet ENCODED_CHARS = AsciiSet.of("\n\t\b\f\r\"\\");
055
056   /** Use newlines instead of commas between members. */
057   protected final boolean useNewlineSeparators;
058
059   /** Use unquoted strings for simple values. */
060   protected final boolean useUnquotedStrings;
061
062   /** Use unquoted keys when safe. */
063   protected final boolean useUnquotedKeys;
064
065   /** Omit root braces. */
066   protected final boolean omitRootBraces;
067
068   /** Use triple-quoted """ for strings with newlines. */
069   protected final boolean useMultilineStrings;
070
071   /** Use = (not :) for key-value separator. */
072   protected final boolean useEqualsSign;
073
074   /**
075    * Constructor.
076    *
077    * @param out The writer being wrapped.
078    * @param useWhitespace If <jk>true</jk>, use indentation and newlines.
079    * @param maxIndent The maximum indentation level.
080    * @param trimStrings If <jk>true</jk>, trim strings before serialization.
081    * @param useNewlineSeparators Use newlines instead of commas.
082    * @param useUnquotedStrings Use unquoted strings for simple values.
083    * @param useUnquotedKeys Use unquoted keys when safe.
084    * @param omitRootBraces Omit root object braces.
085    * @param useMultilineStrings Use """ for multiline strings.
086    * @param useEqualsSign Use = for key-value separator.
087    * @param uriResolver The URI resolver.
088    */
089   @SuppressWarnings({
090      "java:S107" // Constructor requires many parameters for HOCON writer configuration
091   })
092   protected HoconWriter(Writer out, boolean useWhitespace, int maxIndent, boolean trimStrings,
093         boolean useNewlineSeparators, boolean useUnquotedStrings, boolean useUnquotedKeys,
094         boolean omitRootBraces, boolean useMultilineStrings, boolean useEqualsSign,
095         UriResolver uriResolver) {
096      super(out, useWhitespace, maxIndent, trimStrings, '"', uriResolver);
097      this.useNewlineSeparators = useNewlineSeparators;
098      this.useUnquotedStrings = useUnquotedStrings;
099      this.useUnquotedKeys = useUnquotedKeys;
100      this.omitRootBraces = omitRootBraces;
101      this.useMultilineStrings = useMultilineStrings;
102      this.useEqualsSign = useEqualsSign;
103   }
104
105   /**
106    * Writes the key (unquoted or quoted).
107    *
108    * @param key The key to write.
109    * @return This object.
110    */
111   public HoconWriter key(String key) {
112      if (key == null)
113         key = "";
114      if (needsQuoting(key))
115         quotedString(key);
116      else
117         unquotedString(key);
118      return this;
119   }
120
121   /**
122    * Writes the key-value separator (= or :).
123    *
124    * @return This object.
125    */
126   public HoconWriter equalsSign() {
127      if (useEqualsSign)
128         w(" = ");
129      else
130         w(": ");
131      return this;
132   }
133
134   /**
135    * Writes object start.
136    *
137    * @param depth The current indentation depth.
138    * @return This object.
139    */
140   public HoconWriter objectStart(int depth) {
141      w('{');
142      if (useWhitespace)
143         nl(depth + 1);
144      return this;
145   }
146
147   /**
148    * Writes object end.
149    *
150    * @param depth The current indentation depth.
151    * @return This object.
152    */
153   public HoconWriter objectEnd(int depth) {
154      if (useWhitespace)
155         nl(depth);
156      w('}');
157      return this;
158   }
159
160   /**
161    * Writes array start.
162    *
163    * @return This object.
164    */
165   public HoconWriter arrayStart() {
166      w('[');
167      return this;
168   }
169
170   /**
171    * Writes array end.
172    *
173    * @return This object.
174    */
175   public HoconWriter arrayEnd() {
176      w(']');
177      return this;
178   }
179
180   /**
181    * Writes member separator (newline or comma).
182    *
183    * @param depth The current indentation depth.
184    * @return This object.
185    */
186   public HoconWriter separator(int depth) {
187      if (useNewlineSeparators)
188         nl(depth);
189      else
190         w(',');
191      return this;
192   }
193
194   /**
195    * Returns whether the key needs quoting.
196    *
197    * @param key The key to check.
198    * @return <jk>true</jk> if the key must be quoted.
199    */
200   public boolean needsQuoting(String key) {
201      if (isEmpty(key))
202         return true;
203      if (!useUnquotedKeys)
204         return true;
205      for (var i = 0; i < key.length(); i++) {
206         if (QUOTE_KEY_CHARS.contains(key.charAt(i)))
207            return true;
208      }
209      return "true".equals(key) || "false".equals(key) || "null".equals(key) || isNumber(key);
210   }
211
212   /**
213    * Returns whether the value can be written as unquoted.
214    *
215    * @param value The value to check.
216    * @return <jk>true</jk> if the value can be unquoted.
217    */
218   public boolean isSimpleValue(String value) {
219      if (isEmpty(value))
220         return false;
221      if (!useUnquotedStrings)
222         return false;
223      if (value.startsWith("{") || value.startsWith("[") || value.startsWith("\"") || value.startsWith("'"))
224         return false;
225      if (value.startsWith("#") || value.startsWith("//") || value.startsWith("$"))
226         return false;
227      if (value.contains("\n") || value.contains("\r"))
228         return false;
229      for (var i = 0; i < value.length(); i++) {
230         if (QUOTE_VALUE_CHARS.contains(value.charAt(i)))
231            return false;
232      }
233      if ("true".equals(value) || "false".equals(value) || "null".equals(value))
234         return false;
235      return !isNumber(value);
236   }
237
238   private static boolean isNumber(String s) {
239      if (isEmpty(s))
240         return false;
241      var i = s.startsWith("-") ? 1 : 0;
242      if (i >= s.length())
243         return false;
244      if (s.charAt(i) == '0' && s.length() > i + 1 && s.charAt(i + 1) != '.')
245         return false;
246      for (; i < s.length(); i++) {
247         var c = s.charAt(i);
248         if (c >= '0' && c <= '9')
249            continue;
250         if (c == '.' || c == 'e' || c == 'E' || c == '+' || c == '-')
251            continue;
252         return false;
253      }
254      try {
255         Double.parseDouble(s);
256         return true;
257      } catch (@SuppressWarnings("unused") NumberFormatException e) {
258         return false;
259      }
260   }
261
262   /**
263    * Writes an unquoted string value.
264    *
265    * @param value The value to write.
266    * @return This object.
267    */
268   public HoconWriter unquotedString(String value) {
269      if (value != null)
270         w(value);
271      return this;
272   }
273
274   /**
275    * Writes a quoted string with JSON escaping.
276    *
277    * @param value The value to write.
278    * @return This object.
279    */
280   public HoconWriter quotedString(String value) {
281      if (value == null) {
282         w("null");
283         return this;
284      }
285      w('"');
286      for (var i = 0; i < value.length(); i++) {
287         var c = value.charAt(i);
288         if (ENCODED_CHARS.contains(c)) {
289            w('\\');
290            w(switch (c) {
291               case '\n' -> 'n';
292               case '\t' -> 't';
293               case '\b' -> 'b';
294               case '\f' -> 'f';
295               case '\r' -> 'r';
296               case '"' -> '"';
297               case '\\' -> '\\';
298               default -> c;
299            });
300         } else {
301            w(c);
302         }
303      }
304      w('"');
305      return this;
306   }
307
308   /**
309    * Writes a triple-quoted string using """ syntax.
310    *
311    * @param value The value to write.
312    * @return This object.
313    */
314   public HoconWriter tripleQuotedString(String value) {
315      if (value == null) {
316         w("null");
317         return this;
318      }
319      w("\"\"\"");
320      w(value.replace("\r\n", "\n").replace("\r", "\n"));
321      w("\"\"\"");
322      return this;
323   }
324
325   // Override return types for chaining
326   @Override public HoconWriter append(char c) { super.append(c); return this; }
327   @Override public HoconWriter append(char[] value) { super.append(value); return this; }
328   @Override public HoconWriter append(int indent, char c) { super.append(indent, c); return this; }
329   @Override public HoconWriter append(int indent, String text) { super.append(indent, text); return this; }
330   @Override public HoconWriter append(Object text) { super.append(text); return this; }
331   @Override public HoconWriter append(String text) { super.append(text); return this; }
332   @Override public HoconWriter appendIf(boolean b, char c) { super.appendIf(b, c); return this; }
333   @Override public HoconWriter appendIf(boolean b, String text) { super.appendIf(b, text); return this; }
334   @Override public HoconWriter appendln(int indent, String text) { super.appendln(indent, text); return this; }
335   @Override public HoconWriter appendln(String text) { super.appendln(text); return this; }
336   @Override public HoconWriter appendUri(Object value) { super.appendUri(value); return this; }
337   @Override public HoconWriter cr(int depth) { super.cr(depth); return this; }
338   @Override public HoconWriter cre(int depth) { super.cre(depth); return this; }
339   @Override public HoconWriter i(int indent) { super.i(indent); return this; }
340   @Override public HoconWriter ie(int indent) { super.ie(indent); return this; }
341   @Override public HoconWriter nl(int indent) { super.nl(indent); return this; }
342   @Override public HoconWriter nlIf(boolean flag, int indent) { super.nlIf(flag, indent); return this; }
343   @Override public HoconWriter q() { super.q(); return this; }
344   @Override public HoconWriter s() { super.s(); return this; }
345   @Override public HoconWriter sIf(boolean flag) { super.sIf(flag); return this; }
346   @Override public HoconWriter w(char value) { super.w(value); return this; }
347   @Override public HoconWriter w(String value) { super.w(value); return this; }
348}
